case_title: MARGARITO CARMONA VS. ZALDE DI RAMOS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARMONA, MARGARITO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMOS, ZALDE DI AN INDIVIDUAL $10,028.51 PRINCIPAL, $110.47 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,438.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
